Package index

All functions

ConsortiumMetabolism()
Functional Microbiome Representation
ConsortiumMetabolismAlignment()
Constructor for ConsortiumMetabolismAlignment Objects
ConsortiumMetabolismSet()
Set of ConsortiumMetabolism Objects
align()
Align Consortium Metabolisms
compareAlignments()
Compare Alignments (Deprecated)
consortia()
Get the Consortia
description() `description<-`()
Get or Set Object Description
extractCluster()
Extract a Cluster
functionalGroups()
Get Functional Groups
importMisosoup()
Import and Process Misosoup Data
metabolites()
Get Metabolites
misosoup24
Example Data from MiSoSoup 2024
name() `name<-`()
Get or Set Object Name
overviewMisosoup()
Overview of Misosoup Data Structure
pathways()
Retrieve Metabolic Pathways
pivotCM()
Pivot ConsortiaMetabolism Input Data
plot(<ConsortiumMetabolism>,<ANY>)
Plot a ConsortiumMetabolism object
plot(<ConsortiumMetabolismAlignment>,<ANY>)
Plot a ConsortiumMetabolismAlignment object
plot(<ConsortiumMetabolismSet>,<ANY>)
Plot a ConsortiumMetabolismSet object
plotAlignmentHeatmap()
Plot Alignment Heatmap (Deprecated)
plotAlignmentNetwork()
Plot Alignment Network (Deprecated)
plotDirectedFlow()
Plot a Directed Graph Emphasizing Flow
prevalence()
Get Pathway Prevalence
scores()
Get Alignment Scores
show(<ConsortiumMetabolism>)
Show Method for ConsortiumMetabolism Object
show(<ConsortiumMetabolismAlignment>)
Show method for ConsortiumMetabolismAlignment Objects
show(<ConsortiumMetabolismSet>)
Show Method for ConsortiumMetabolismSet Object
similarityMatrix()
Get Similarity Matrix
species()
Return Species in a Consortium
synCM()
Generate Synthetic Consortium Metabolism
